en: First of all, then, I urge that supplications, prayers, intercessions, and thanksgivings be made for all people,
zh: 因此，我勸你最重要的是要為萬人、君王和一切有權位的懇求、禱告、代求和感恩，好讓我們可以敬虔莊重地過平靜安穩的日子。

en: for kings and all who are in high positions, that we may lead a peaceful and quiet life, godly and dignified in every way.
This is good, and it is pleasing in the sight of God our Savior,
zh: 在我們的救主 神看來，這是美好的，可蒙悅納的。

en: who desires all people to be saved and to come to the knowledge of the truth.
zh: 他願意萬人得救，並且充分認識真理。

en: For there is one God, and there is one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus,
zh: 因為 神只有一位，在 神和人中間也只有一位中保，就是降世為人的基督耶穌。

en: who gave himself as a ransom for all, which is the testimony given at the proper time.
zh: 他捨了自己作萬人的贖價，到了適當的時候，這事就證實了。

en: For this I was appointed a preacher and an apostle (I am telling the truth, I am not lying), a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
zh: 為了這事，我也被派作傳道的和使徒 ，在信仰和真理上作外族人的教師。

en: I desire then that in every place the men should pray, lifting holy hands without anger or quarreling;
zh: 因此，我願意男人沒有忿怒，沒有爭論，舉起聖潔的手隨處禱告。

en: likewise also that women should adorn themselves in respectable apparel, with modesty and self-control, not with braided hair and gold or pearls or costly attire,
zh: 照樣，我也願意女人以端正、嫻淑、自律為裝飾；不要以鬈髮、金飾、珠寶，或名貴衣裳為裝飾，

en: but with what is proper for women who profess godliness- with good works.
zh: 卻要以善行作裝飾，這才配稱為敬畏 神的女人。

en: Let a woman learn quietly with all submissiveness.
zh: 女人應該安靜而又完全順服地學習。

en: I do not permit a woman to teach or to exercise authority over a man; rather, she is to remain quiet.
zh: 我不准女人教導，或轄制男人；女人總要安靜。

en: For Adam was formed first, then Eve;
zh: 因為先造的是亞當，後造的是夏娃；

en: and Adam was not deceived, but the woman was deceived and became a transgressor.
zh: 不是亞當受了引誘，而是女人受了引誘，陷在過犯裡面。

en: Yet she will be saved through childbearing- if they continue in faith and love and holiness, with self-control.
zh: 然而女人要是常常存著信心、愛心、聖潔自律，在她生育的事上必定得救。
